column1: #: description: 14 observation channels used in this analysis. The first 7 channels correspond to the BNB
column2: while the last 7 channels correspond to the NuMI beam. Each set of seven channels is split by reconstructed event type as well as containment in the detector
column3: fully contained (FC) or partially contained (PC). The seven channels in order are $\nu_e$CC FC
column9: and NC $\pi^0$. Each channel contains 25 bins from 0 to 2500 MeV of reconstructed neutrino energy

column1: #: keyword reactions: NUE CC | NUMU CC
